race.comment: VELOCE METEOR (2) scored two runs back then was well in commission last time but could only manage to finish fifth over the same trip at Charleville. Gets 3kg weight relief with the claim and looks nicely placed to make amends. TOUGH JUDGE (5) last appeared when he scored over 1200m at this track on November 18. Looks a winning chance. STECARA (6) was impressive last time at Charleville, scoring by 3 lengths over this trip. Should be prominent from the outset and rates as one of the main contenders. ELIZABASS (9) raced on the speed last start and battled on well but found one better over 1200m at Kilcoy. Can give a tremendous sight again.
